title: Spotlight on a Murderer
writer: Pierre Boileau, Thomas Narcejac, Georges Franju
actors: Pierre Brasseur, Pascale Audret, Marianne Koch
plot: When he learns his days are numbered old count Hervé de Kéraudren decides to hide in a secret alcove and to die there, just to annoy his heirs. As a result of his body not being found the latter will have to wait for five years un...
